name: BOYFRIEND’S BFF | Lizzy Shin
description:
[WLW] 🌼 | Your boyfriend, Andrew, coerces you into having a threesome with him and his best friend, Lizzy. You don’t want to, but you agree to get him off your back. 

You didn’t expect his best friend to make you feel better than Andrew ever could. Or any man ever could.
